org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows

## Class GlobalWindow

  * [java.lang.Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
  *     * [org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows.Window](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/streaming/api/windowing/windows/Window.html> "class in org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows")
    *       * org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows.GlobalWindow

  * * * *




        [@PublicEvolving](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/PublicEvolving.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
        public class GlobalWindow
        extends [Window](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/streaming/api/windowing/windows/Window.html> "class in org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.windows")

The default window into which all data is placed (via [`GlobalWindows`](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/streaming/api/windowing/assigners/GlobalWindows.html> "class in org.apache.flink.streaming.api.windowing.assigners")).
